tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Longer chords
Dan Fogelberg  1979 *

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Longer

[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] \ [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
  
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Longer than there have been fishes in the ocean[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Higher than any bird ever flew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Longer than there've been stars up in the heavens[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I've been in love with you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Stronger than any mountain cathedral[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Truer than any tree ever grew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Deeper than any forest primeval[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I am in love with you[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
I'll bring fire in the winter[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]
You'll send showers in the spring[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
We'll fly through the falls and summers[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
With love on our wings[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Through the years as the fire starts to mellow[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
Burning lines in the book of our lives[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]       
Though the binding cracks, and the pages start to yellow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be in love with you[/tab]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Longer than there have been fishes in the ocean[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Higher than any bird ever flew[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Longer than there've been stars up in the heavens[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]   
I've been in love with you[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I am in love with you[/tab]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

Capo III

[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Am[/ch] = [ch]F#m[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] = [ch]G#m[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  = [ch]B[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]D7[/ch] = [ch]B7[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]  = [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] = [ch]C[/ch]
